summary: The prior architecture-boundary-ac-traceability finding is resolved. AC-1 through AC-8 are now attached to substantive behavioral assertions in the production-shaped E2E rather than a marker-only or acceptance-prose test, and exact-head pr prepare reports acceptance_e2e_coverage passed with 8 of 8 criteria covered and none missing. The runtime remains owned by the run-session boundary, the CLI remains an outer composition adapter, merged PR #377 and PR #382 owners are reused, Surface-aware Agent Review Freshness from current origin/main remains compatible, and PR creation, merge, waiver, and material external side effects remain outside autonomous execution.

prior_finding_resolution.reason: Commit 926227f945878299770448a03966c17dfa70158d changes only test/e2e/story-vibepro-one-command-pr-ready-closure-runtime.spec.ts. Its AC markers are assertion messages on observed action_profile, current-HEAD pr_ready, implementation and repair HEADs, managed-worktree confinement, independent read-only review, typed stops, active Story/roadmap state, and forbidden autonomous actions. No marker-only assertion or circular acceptance-prose comparison is present. pr-prepare.json reports status=passed, covered_acceptance_criteria_count=8, and missing_acceptance_criteria=[].

checks.reason: src/one-command-pr-ready-closure.js remains a callback-injected policy owner inside the run-session module boundary and imports only node:timers/promises. src/guarded-run-session.js composes it with the existing review and runtime boundaries.
No inspected run-session implementation imports src/cli.js. The exact-head conformance artifact records new_run_session_cli_reverse_dependency=false.

The implementation continues to use src/agent-runtime-connectors.js as the production provider boundary established by merged PR #377; this traceability repair changes no production source and introduces no duplicate connector.

src/guarded-run-session.js composes createGuardedIndependentReviewRunner from src/independent-review-orchestrator.js, retaining the lifecycle and read-only review owner established by merged PR #382 rather than duplicating it.

The baseline is origin/main containing Surface-aware Agent Review Freshness. Its exact focused E2E matrix passed 8 of 8 tests alongside the closure E2E, including unchanged-surface reuse, role-selective staleness, unresolved-file fail-closed behavior, and strict-HEAD compatibility.

The autonomous action owner set remains diagnose, prepare_artifacts, implement, verify, review, repair, and final_prepare. The production objectives explicitly prohibit PR creation, merge, waiver, deploy, publish, and other external side effects; the E2E verifies pr_create, merge, and waiver are absent from the plan.

final_prepare remains the only owner that returns pr_ready and requires prepared HEAD equality plus gate_status.ready_for_pr_create=true. The E2E asserts pr_ready after implementation, needs_changes repair, re-verification, fresh independent review, and current-HEAD final preparation.

AC-1 through AC-8 are bound to concrete assertions over runtime results or executable repository state. Exact-head pr prepare reports acceptance_e2e_coverage.status=passed, acceptance_criteria_count=8, covered_acceptance_criteria_count=8, and no missing acceptance criteria.

The exact-head conformance artifact compares with origin/main@118b68091b296f6bb8c4414cfc5eadb69ed73dc0 and improves violations from 81 to 80, delta -1, without a new run-session-to-CLI reverse dependency.

The repair delta from 5cb813d26c831d0e3770f453dec2a82750f731cb changes only the closure runtime E2E. Closure behavior, scope-boundary behavior, and latest-main review-freshness behavior passed 18 of 18 tests, and git diff --check passed.

The only repair path is the declared closure E2E surface. pr prepare maps all eight Story criteria to that executable file, the scope-boundary regression suite passes, and there is no production-code expansion in the traceability repair.
